'''vanatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readjuster|readjuster]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readjuster|readjuster]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vanatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vænæthæth|vænæthæth]] || [[word:vænæthæj|vænæthæj]] || [[word:vænæthæsh|vænæthæsh]] || [[word:vænæthæ|vænæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vananathath|vananathath]] || [[word:vananathaj|vananathaj]] || [[word:vananathash|vananathash]] || [[word:vananatha|vananatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vanathath|vanathath]] || [[word:vanathaj|vanathaj]] || [[word:vanathash|vanathash]] || [[word:vanatha|vanatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vanafthath|vanafthath]] || [[word:vanafthaj|vanafthaj]] || [[word:vanafthash|vanafthash]] || [[word:vanafthaf|vanafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vanathatha|vanathatha]] || [[word:vanathaja|vanathaja]] || [[word:vanathasha|vanathasha]] || [[word:vanathaka|vanathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vanathath|vanathath]] || [[word:vanathaj|vanathaj]] || [[word:vanathash|vanathash]] || [[word:vanatha|vanatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vanathathal|vanathathal]] || [[word:vanathajal|vanathajal]] || [[word:vanathashal|vanathashal]] || [[word:vanathakal|vanathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vanathathatha|vanathathatha]] || [[word:vanathajaja|vanathajaja]] || [[word:vanathashasha|vanathashasha]] || [[word:vanathaka|vanathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vanathathan|vanathathan]] || [[word:vanathajan|vanathajan]] || [[word:vanathashan|vanathashan]] || [[word:vanathakan|vanathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vanathathaoro|vanathathaoro]] || [[word:vanathajaoro|vanathajaoro]] || [[word:vanathashaoro|vanathashaoro]] || [[word:vanathakaoro|vanathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
